name: tq
description: Intake → Triage → Task management system (triage queue)

scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/core && tsc -p packages/contract && tsc -p packages/extension-sdk && tsc -p packages/ext-triage && tsc -p packages/ext-search-semantic && tsc -p packages/ext-atlassian && tsc -p packages/daemon && tsc -p packages/cli && pnpm --filter @tq/web typecheck
